title: Alpha
description: Full narrative rebuild — journey-first structure: see it first (S03), learn the levels (S04), understand the gates (S05), then go deeper. Reference sections clearly separated.
highlights: New S03: simplified 5-step cycle walkthrough — concrete story before any vocabulary
New S05: three gates as standalone section — Gate 1/2/3 with clear owner, trigger, and outcome
S04 stripped to intro paragraph + diagram only — phase card detail moved to full walkthrough
Roles, Artifacts, Adapting moved up before reference sections
Reference zone divider added — Layers/Signal Events/Comms/Metrics/Noise clearly marked as depth material
Signal Events diagram nodes updated to current gate names — no more legacy labels
Full walkthrough moved to S14 — serves as 'go deeper' for readers who want every artifact
